record.question: Refund policy theo ngày mua áp dụng như thế nào cho sản phẩm eligible?
record.answer:
- Standard eligible physical-product refunds are allowed within 7 days.
- Nguồn refund_policy.md: # Refund and Return Policy - Standard refunds are allowed within 7 days for eligible physical products. - Flash Sale items normally are not refundable, except when a manufacturer defect is verified within 7 days. - Digital products are not refunded after activation, except duplicate charge, failed delivery, or verified
- Nguồn hr_remote_work.md: # HR Remote Work Policy - Probation employees may request remote work only after manager approval. - During probation, remote work is limited to 2 days per week unless HR approves an exception. - The employee must keep daily check-ins and remain reachable during core hours. - Sources: HR Remote Work Policy.
- Sources: refund_policy.md, hr_remote_work.md

mcp_result.input_summary: Refund policy theo ngày mua áp dụng như thế nào cho sản phẩm eligible?

result.text:
# Refund and Return Policy

- Standard refunds are allowed within 7 days for eligible physical products.
- Flash Sale items normally are not refundable, except when a manufacturer defect is verified within 7 days.
- Digital products are not refunded after activation, except duplicate charge, failed delivery, or verified technical defect.
- Store credit for approved non-cash compensation is 80% of the original paid amount.
- For policy version conflicts, use the policy active on the purchase date.
- Sources: Refund and Return Policy.

# HR Remote Work Policy

- Probation employees may request remote work only after manager approval.
- During probation, remote work is limited to 2 days per week unless HR approves an exception.
- The employee must keep daily check-ins and remain reachable during core hours.
- Sources: HR Remote Work Policy.
